info.title: Users Transfer
info.description: API for transferring user data and deleting users in Zoho CRM

post.description: Transfer user records, assignments, and criteria to another user

schema.description: Request body for transferring and deleting user data

transfer_and_delete.description: Array of transfer and delete operations

move_subordinate.description: Details of the user to whom subordinates will be moved

id.description: User ID to move subordinates to

transfer.description: Transfer settings for records, assignments, and criteria

id.description: User ID to transfer data to

schema.description: Response body for successful user transfer and delete operation

transfer_and_delete.description: Array containing transfer and delete operation results

details.description: Additional details about the scheduled operation

job_id.description: Unique identifier for the scheduled job

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data or missing required fields

oneOf.description: Error response for expected field missing
Error response for invalid user or data

403.description: Forbidden - User does not have permission to perform this operation

message.description: Error message describing the permission issue

permissions.description: List of required permissions that are missing
